findings.quote: Late-life mental gains seem to come from sustained effort, not from music specifically.
findings.note: Main-idea item: B ('...childhood...') is topically off from the late-life framing of the other options and is eliminable; among the rest C is the hedged synthesis that main-idea keys usually take. A test-savvy lean, not a form-only certainty, so flag not kill.

findings.quote: Every participant improved dramatically once the sixteen-week course had ended.
findings.note: B is the absolute/quantifier-upgrade trap; D is an outside-knowledge generalization not about these volunteers; C ('well over ten hours' of practice) is an implausibly large figure for elderly beginners. Eliminating 2+ leaves the moderate A as the lean; passage still needed to confirm, so flag.

findings.quote: The book-club readers improved by about as much as the cello students did.
findings.note: A (no improvement) and B (considerably more, every measure) are polar extremes; C (a comparison/reading group that 'practiced an instrument') is self-contradictory. The moderate spectrum-middle D is the lean, but direction still needs the passage. Flag.

findings.quote: The particular skills of cello playing, such as timing and finger control.
findings.note: Stem asks the cause 'in both groups'; A is single-group (cello-only) and mismatches the stem, eliminable. B echoes 'both activities happened to share'. C/D are also cross-group so B is not uniquely forced; lean B, flag not kill.

findings.quote: Reserved: the writer finds the claim appealing but thinks the evidence points elsewhere.
findings.note: Stance-tone spectrum (Convinced / Reserved / Dismissive / Detached). A is the elaborated balanced stance that tone keys typically take; a test-heuristic lean, not a form-only certainty. Flag.

findings.quote: Fading daylight alone, since the owls hunt strictly by a fixed internal clock.
findings.note: The owl is fictional so no recall is possible. B is internally self-contradictory ('fading daylight alone' vs 'fixed internal clock'), eliminable; C is the only complete causal chain (bats stir moths the owls eat). A/D remain substantively plausible, so lean C but flag, not a lethal form-only leak.

findings.quote: Keepers were paid only when ships arrived safely, so keeping the lamps lit served their own interest.
findings.note: Fictional port (no recall). C ('always less effective') and B ('generally far higher') are over-broad absolutes; A restates the outcome rather than giving a 'why'. D is the incentive-alignment explanation reachable by economic domain reasoning (cf. Ostrom hard-negative precedent) -> flag, not a form-only structural kill.

findings.quote: Vid ängarna närmast lyktorna ökade de nattaktiva fjärilarnas besök märkbart, medan ängar längre bort inte förändrades.
findings.note: A reverses the stem's causal arrow (butterflies causing the switch-off); B is an absolute ('samtliga ängar', 'mångdubblade'); C introduces honeybees, off-topic to a moth study. D is the scoped/hedged result. Lean D; 100 m detail still needs the passage, so flag.

findings.quote: Lyktans sken överröstar det svaga horisontljus som fjärilarna orienterar sig efter, så att de cirklar kring lampan i stället.
findings.note: Moth navigation by the horizon glow (dorsal-light / celestial orientation) is real science; B (burns eyes), C (frightened, flee entirely), D (scent destroyed) are naive folk-theories. Domain knowledge leans A; distractors are substantive, so flag not kill.

findings.quote: Konstgjord belysning slår ut pollineringen överallt och bör därför avvecklas i hela landskapet.
findings.note: Main-message item: B is the absolute over-claim ('överallt', 'avvecklas i hela landskapet'); A and D are single-detail statements. C is the balanced hedged summary main-idea keys take. Lean C, flag.

findings.quote: De saknade helt nattaktiva fjärilar och kunde därför inte påverkas av försöket.
findings.note: A is an absolute ('saknade helt'); C invents a honeybee substitution; D is naive reversed logic ('farthest should benefit most'). B is the nuanced inference. Lean B, passage needed to ground the 100 m premise, so flag.

findings.quote: Att kultursatsningar aldrig går att mäta på ett meningsfullt sätt.
findings.note: Author's-stance item: C is the absolutized version ('aldrig') and eliminable; A/D are concessions/details. B is the balanced articulated objection stance keys take. Lean B, flag. (NB: candidate_id 'las-b1-001' collides with gen-las-long-001.)

findings.quote: Enbart kaféerna; utställningarna saknade helt betydelse för besökarna.
findings.note: A shifts scope (first-time vs returning visitors), eliminable; D is the absolutized twin ('enbart', 'saknade helt') built from the moderate C, which mildly signals C as key. B vs C direction (cafés vs exhibitions) still needs the passage, so PARTIALLY -> flag, lean C.

findings.quote: Ett herbarium säger i själva verket ingenting om växterna, bara om den som samlat dem.
findings.note: Main-idea item: C is the absolute ('ingenting') and D a detail-plus-ranking; A is the both/and synthesis main-idea keys take. Lean A, flag.

findings.quote: Selmas bok rymmer enbart vetenskap, medan Heddas enbart rymmer känslor.
findings.note: C is absolute on both sides ('enbart/enbart'), eliminable. A and D are mirror-image attributions; deciding the direction (system vs place/memory) needs the passage. Eliminate C, lean D, flag.
